title: Maintain good manufacturing practice in meat processing
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain good manufacturing practice in meat processing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret statutory and workplace requirements relating to GMP
